_meta.notes: Browser tools are always available. Test tools (test_*, generator_*, planner_*) require --test capability. The selector/startSelector/endSelector properties are stripped from the exported schemas by filteredTools() in tools.ts. Capabilities: config, core, core-navigate, core-tabs, core-input, network, pdf, storage, testing, vision, devtools.

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the page

tools.name: browser_resize
tools.description: Resize the browser window

tools.name: browser_get_config
tools.description: Get the final resolved config after merging CLI options, environment variables and config file.

tools.name: browser_console_messages
tools.description: Returns all console messages

level.description: Level of the console messages to return. Each level includes the messages of more severe levels. Defaults to "info".

all.description: Return all console messages since the beginning of the session, not just since the last navigation. Defaults to false.

filename.description: Filename to save the console messages to. If not provided, messages are returned as text.

tools.name: browser_console_clear
tools.description: Clear all console messages

tools.name: browser_cookie_list
tools.description: List all cookies (optionally filtered by domain/path)

tools.name: browser_cookie_get
tools.description: Get a specific cookie by name

tools.name: browser_cookie_set
tools.description: Set a cookie with optional flags (domain, path, expires, httpOnly, secure, sameSite)

httpOnly.description: Whether the cookie is HTTP only

tools.name: browser_cookie_delete
tools.description: Delete a specific cookie

tools.name: browser_cookie_clear
tools.description: Clear all cookies

tools.name: browser_resume
tools.description: Resume script execution after it was paused. When called with step set to true, execution will pause again before the next action.

step.description: When true, execution will pause again before the next action, allowing step-by-step debugging.

location.description: Pause execution at a specific <file>:<line>, e.g. "example.spec.ts:42".

tools.name: browser_handle_dialog
tools.description: Handle a dialog

promptText.description: The text of the prompt in case of a prompt dialog.

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate JavaScript expression on page or element

function.description: () => { /* code */ } or (element) => { /* code */ } when element is provided

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available.

tools.name: browser_file_upload
tools.description: Upload one or multiple files

paths.description: The absolute paths to the files to upload. Can be single file or multiple files. If omitted, file chooser is cancelled.

tools.name: browser_fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple form fields

ref.description: Exact target field reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the field element, when "ref" is not available

value.description: Value to fill in the field. Checkbox/radio: true/false. Combobox: option text

tools.name: browser_press_key
tools.description: Press a key on the keyboard

key.description: Name of the key to press or a character to generate, such as `ArrowLeft` or `a`

tools.name: browser_press_sequentially
tools.description: Type text key by key on the keyboard

submit.description: Whether to submit entered text (press Enter after)

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into editable element

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

text.description: Text to type into the element

submit.description: Whether to submit entered text (press Enter after)

slowly.description: Whether to type one character at a time. Useful for triggering key handlers in the page. By default entire text is filled in at once.

tools.name: browser_keydown
tools.description: Press a key down on the keyboard

key.description: Name of the key to press or a character to generate, such as `ArrowLeft` or `a`

tools.name: browser_keyup
tools.description: Press a key up on the keyboard

key.description: Name of the key to press or a character to generate, such as `ArrowLeft` or `a`

tools.name: browser_mouse_move_xy
tools.description: Move mouse to a given position

tools.name: browser_mouse_down
tools.description: Press mouse down

button.description: Button to press, defaults to left

tools.name: browser_mouse_up
tools.description: Press mouse up

button.description: Button to press, defaults to left

tools.name: browser_mouse_wheel
tools.description: Scroll mouse wheel

tools.name: browser_mouse_click_xy
tools.description: Click mouse button at a given position

button.description: Button to click, defaults to left

delay.description: Time to wait between mouse down and up (milliseconds), defaults to 0

tools.name: browser_mouse_drag_xy
tools.description: Drag left mouse button to a given position

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL

tools.name: browser_navigate_back
tools.description: Go back to the previous page in the history

tools.name: browser_navigate_forward
tools.description: Go forward to the next page in the history

tools.name: browser_reload
tools.description: Reload the current page

tools.name: browser_network_requests
tools.description: Returns all network requests since loading the page

static.description: Whether to include successful static resources like images, fonts, scripts, etc.

filter.description: Only return requests whose URL matches this regexp (e.g. '/api/.*user')

filename.description: Filename to save the network requests to. If not provided, requests are returned as text

tools.name: browser_network_clear
tools.description: Clear all network requests

tools.name: browser_network_state_set
tools.description: Sets the browser network state to online or offline. When offline, all network requests will fail.

state.description: Set to 'offline' to simulate offline mode, 'online' to restore network connectivity

tools.name: browser_pdf_save
tools.description: Save page as PDF

filename.description: File name to save the pdf to. Defaults to `page-{timestamp}.pdf` if not specified. Prefer relative file names to stay within the output directory.

tools.name: browser_route
tools.description: Set up a route to mock network requests matching a URL pattern

headers.description: Headers to add in "Name: Value" format

removeHeaders.description: Comma-separated list of header names to remove from request

tools.name: browser_route_list
tools.description: List all active network routes

tools.name: browser_unroute
tools.description: Remove network routes matching a pattern (or all routes if no pattern specified)

pattern.description: URL pattern to unroute (omit to remove all routes)

tools.name: browser_run_code
tools.description: Run Playwright code snippet

code.description: A JavaScript function containing Playwright code to execute. It will be invoked with a single argument, page, which you can use for any page interaction. For example: `async (page) => { await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Submit' }).click(); return await page.title(); }`

tools.name: browser_take_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page. You can't perform actions based on the screenshot, use browser_snapshot for actions.

type.description: Image format for the screenshot. Default is png.

filename.description: File name to save the screenshot to. Defaults to `page-{timestamp}.{png|jpeg}` if not specified.

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to screenshot the element.

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot.

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available.

fullPage.description: When true, takes a screenshot of the full scrollable page, instead of the currently visible viewport. Cannot be used with element screenshots.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: Capture accessibility snapshot of the current page, this is better than screenshot

filename.description: Save snapshot to markdown file instead of returning it in the response.

selector.description: Element selector of the root element to capture a partial snapshot instead of the whole page

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Perform click on a web page

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

doubleClick.description: Whether to perform a double click instead of a single click

button.description: Button to click, defaults to left

tools.name: browser_drag
tools.description: Perform drag and drop between two elements

startElement.description: Human-readable source element description used to obtain the permission to interact with the element

startRef.description: Exact source element reference from the page snapshot

startSelector.description: CSS or role selector for the source element, when ref is not available

endElement.description: Human-readable target element description used to obtain the permission to interact with the element

endRef.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

endSelector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when ref is not available

tools.name: browser_hover
tools.description: Hover over element on page

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

tools.name: browser_select_option
tools.description: Select an option in a dropdown

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

values.description: Array of values to select in the dropdown. This can be a single value or multiple values.

tools.name: browser_generate_locator
tools.description: Generate locator for the given element to use in tests

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

tools.name: browser_check
tools.description: Check a checkbox or radio button

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

tools.name: browser_uncheck
tools.description: Uncheck a checkbox or radio button

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element, when "ref" is not available

tools.name: browser_storage_state
tools.description: Save storage state (cookies, local storage) to a file for later reuse

filename.description: File name to save the storage state to. Defaults to `storage-state-{timestamp}.json`

tools.name: browser_set_storage_state
tools.description: Restore storage state (cookies, local storage) from a file. This clears existing cookies and local storage before restoring.

filename.description: Path to the storage state file to restore from

tools.name: browser_tabs
tools.description: List, create, close, or select a browser tab.

index.description: Tab index, used for close/select. If omitted for close, current tab is closed.

tools.name: browser_start_tracing
tools.description: Start trace recording

tools.name: browser_stop_tracing
tools.description: Stop trace recording

tools.name: browser_verify_element_visible
tools.description: Verify element is visible on the page

role.description: ROLE of the element. Can be found in the snapshot like this: `- {ROLE}`

accessibleName.description: ACCESSIBLE_NAME of the element. Can be found in the snapshot like this: `- role`

tools.name: browser_verify_text_visible
tools.description: Verify text is visible on the page. Prefer browser_verify_element_visible if possible.

text.description: TEXT to verify. Can be found in the snapshot

tools.name: browser_verify_list_visible
tools.description: Verify list is visible on the page

ref.description: Exact target element reference that points to the list

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target list

tools.name: browser_verify_value
tools.description: Verify element value

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

selector.description: CSS or role selector for the target element

value.description: Value to verify. For checkbox, use true or false.

tools.name: browser_start_video
tools.description: Start video recording

tools.name: browser_stop_video
tools.description: Stop video recording

tools.name: browser_wait_for
tools.description: Wait for text to appear or disappear or a specified time to pass

time.description: The time to wait in seconds

textGone.description: The text to wait for to disappear

tools.name: browser_localstorage_list
tools.description: List all localStorage key-value pairs

tools.name: browser_localstorage_get
tools.description: Get a localStorage item by key

tools.name: browser_localstorage_set
tools.description: Set a localStorage item

tools.name: browser_localstorage_delete
tools.description: Delete a localStorage item

tools.name: browser_localstorage_clear
tools.description: Clear all localStorage

tools.name: browser_sessionstorage_list
tools.description: List all sessionStorage key-value pairs

tools.name: browser_sessionstorage_get
tools.description: Get a sessionStorage item by key

tools.name: browser_sessionstorage_set
tools.description: Set a sessionStorage item

tools.name: browser_sessionstorage_delete
tools.description: Delete a sessionStorage item

tools.name: browser_sessionstorage_clear
tools.description: Clear all sessionStorage

tools.name: test_list
tools.description: List tests

tools.name: test_run
tools.description: Run tests

locations.description: Folder, file or location to run: "test/e2e" or "test/e2e/file.spec.ts" or "test/e2e/file.spec.ts:20"

projects.description: Projects to run, projects from playwright.config.ts, by default runs all projects. Running with "chromium" is a good start

tools.name: test_debug
tools.description: Debug single test

title.description: Human readable test title for granting permission to debug the test.

tools.name: generator_setup_page
tools.description: Setup the page for test.

plan.description: The plan for the test. This should be the actual test plan with all the steps.

project.description: Project to use for setup. For example: 'chromium', if no project is provided uses the first project in the config.

seedFile.description: A seed file contains a single test that is used to setup the page for testing, for example: 'tests/seed.spec.ts'. If no seed file is provided, a default seed file is created.

tools.name: generator_read_log
tools.description: Retrieve the performed test log

tools.name: generator_write_test
tools.description: Write the generated test to the test file

fileName.description: The file to write the test to

tools.name: planner_setup_page
tools.description: Setup the page for test planning

project.description: Project to use for setup. For example: 'chromium', if no project is provided uses the first project in the config.

seedFile.description: A seed file contains a single test that is used to setup the page for testing.

tools.name: planner_submit_plan
tools.description: Submit the test plan to the test planner

overview.description: A brief overview of the application to be tested

seedFile.description: A seed file that was used to setup the page for testing

file.description: The file the test should be saved to, for example: 'tests/<suite-name>/<test-name>.spec.ts'

perform.description: Action to perform. For example: 'Click on the Submit button'

expect.description: Expected result of the action where appropriate

tools.name: planner_save_plan
tools.description: Save the test plan as a markdown file

name.description: The name of the test plan, for example: 'Test Plan'

fileName.description: The file to save the test plan to, for example: 'spec/test.plan.md'. Relative to workspace root

overview.description: A brief overview of the application to be tested

seedFile.description: A seed file that was used to setup the page for testing

file.description: The file the test should be saved to
